title: rubus × haematochrous
intro: Rubus × haematochrous is a hybrid plant species within the genus Rubus, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × haematochrous include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
